zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray於1286年9月4日出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray32歲，母親Rohese de Clare33歲。他於1298年與Baroness Aline de Braose在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年3月23日在英國英格蘭越可爾約克享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray于1286年9月4日出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray32岁，母亲Rohese de Clare33岁。他于1298年与Baroness Aline de Braose在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年3月23日在英国英格兰越可爾約克享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray was born on 4 September 1286, in Norfolk, England, his father, Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray, was 32 and his mother, Rohese de Clare, was 33. He married Baroness Aline de Braose in 1298, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 March 1322, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray est né le 4 septembre 1286, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Clare, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Aline de Braose en 1298, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1322, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray am 4. September 1286 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray 32 und seine Mutter Rohese de Clare 33. Er hat 1298 in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales Baroness Aline de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. März 1322 im Alter von 35 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbrayが1286年9月4日にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbrayは32歳，母Rohese de Clareは33歳であった。1298年にウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアでBaroness Aline de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年3月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray(이)가 1286년 9월 4일 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Clare(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1298년 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 Baroness Aline de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 3월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Baroness Aline de Braose em 1298, em Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray родился 4 сентября 1286 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Mowbray 1st Baron Mowbray было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Clare, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Aline de Braose в 1298 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 марта 1322 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Baroness Aline de Braose en 1298, en Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
